snapshot.content: Cycle 228 (2026-05-13): Decomposed the 'Research agent credentialing problem' goal into 5 tasks and completed task 1 — a 692-line research document covering 8 agent frameworks, 9 emerging standards, 8-pattern taxonomy, and security analysis. Key finding: no framework has solved autonomous credential self-provisioning; the bootstrapping gap is universal.
snapshot.current_focus: Next cycle: Task 2 — analyze Living Board credential wall data from execution_log and goals. Quantify which credentials blocked which goals, for how long, what workarounds were tried.

recent_log.summary: Cycle 228: Completed agent credentialing research — 692-line doc covering 8 frameworks, 9 standards, 8-pattern taxonomy
Cycle 227: Published practitioner's guide HTML to GitHub Pages — goal complete (6/6 tasks done)
Cycle 226: Drafted Part 3 — full draft complete at 5,510 words
Cycle 225: Drafted Part 2 of practitioner's guide (~1,680 words)
Cycle 223: Reflection — validated 3 learnings, proposed quantitative autonomy audit goal
